title: Linear Algebra
description: A rigorous treatment of linear algebra following Hefferon's acclaimed open textbook — from Gaussian elimination and vector spaces through linear maps, determinants, and eigendecomposition. Develops the theoretical foundations that underlie optimization, dimensionality reduction, and geometric transformations in modern ML.

readings.title: Notation Reference
readings.description: Symbolic conventions and Greek letter pronunciation used throughout these readings.

readings.title: Linear Systems and Gauss's Method
readings.description: Setting up linear systems in matrix form, row operations, echelon form, and Gaussian elimination.

readings.title: Solution Sets and the Homogeneous Structure
readings.description: Parametric solution form, the General = Particular + Homogeneous decomposition, and free variables.

readings.title: Norms, Dot Products, and Angles
readings.description: Euclidean length, dot product properties, Cauchy–Schwarz, angles and orthogonality, and ML applications including cosine similarity and distance metrics.

readings.title: Vector Spaces and Subspaces
readings.description: Vector space axioms, canonical examples, subspaces, and spanning sets.

readings.title: Linear Independence and Bases
readings.description: Independence, basis as the minimal spanning set, coordinate representation, and uniqueness.

readings.title: Dimension
readings.description: Invariance of basis size, dimensions of common spaces, rank-nullity, and combining subspaces.

readings.title: Linear Maps: Isomorphisms and Homomorphisms
readings.description: Structure-preserving maps, isomorphism as the right notion of sameness, range and null space.

readings.title: Matrix Representations and Change of Basis
readings.description: Encoding linear maps as matrices, matrix of a composition, similarity, and change-of-basis matrices.

readings.title: Orthogonality and Projection
readings.description: Orthogonal projection, Gram-Schmidt orthogonalization, projection into a subspace, and least squares.

readings.title: Determinants
readings.description: Permutation expansion, key properties, geometric interpretation as signed volume, Laplace's formula.

readings.title: Eigenvalues, Diagonalization, and Jordan Form
readings.description: Characteristic polynomial, diagonalizability, Jordan canonical form, and applications.

quizzes.title: Linear Maps, Change of Basis, and Projection

labs.title: Geometry of Linear Transformations with Word Embeddings
SVD, PCA, and the Geometry of Neural Representations
